chapter_title.en: Chapter 69 – Regarding the Night of Pre-determnation (Laylat Al-Qadr)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/389)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/389)
text: فِي لَيْلَةِ تِسْعَ عَشْرَةَ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ التَّقْدِيرُ وَ فِي لَيْلَةِ إِحْدَى وَ عِشْرِينَ الْقَضَاءُ وَ فِي لَيْلَةِ ثَلَاثٍ وَ عِشْرِينَ إِبْرَامُ مَا يَكُونُ فِي السَّنَةِ إِلَى مِثْلِهَا لِلَّهِ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُهُ يَفْعَلُ مَا يَشَاءُ فِي خَلْقِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Rabie Al Musly and Ziyad Bin Abu Al Hallal, mentioning it from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘During the night of the 19<sup>th</sup> of a Month of Ramazan is the Ordainment, and during the night of the 21<sup>st</sup> is the accomplishment, and during the night of the 23<sup>rd</sup> is confirmation of what would be transpiring during the year up it its like (next Night of Pre-determination). For Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Majestic is His<sup>azwj</sup> Praise, is that He<sup>azwj</sup> Does whatever He<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires to regarding His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures’.
en.sarwar: 12. A number of our people have narrated, from Sahl ibn Ziyad, from Ali ibn al-Hakam, from Rabi’ al-Musliy and Ziyad ibn abu al- Hallal who have narrated it, from a man who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that during the nineteenth night of the month of Ramadan is measurement and determination; in the twenty-first night is decision; and in the twenty-third night is verification of what has to take place during the coming year up to the next night of destiny. Allah, glorious is whose praise, does whatever He wills about His creature.”
